Operation 'createRecord' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is extremely vague with no actionable details. Improved version specifies: the resource being created (DNS record), what inputs are expected (from RecordInput schema), what is returned (Record object with ID), and side effects (record becomes active). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a DNS record in a zone
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new DNS record within the specified zone. Accepts record input containing name, type, content, and optional TTL and priority fields. Returns the created Record object with assigned ID and metadata. The record becomes active immediately upon creation.
data.reasoning: Original description is extremely vague with no actionable details. Improved version specifies: the resource being created (DNS record), what inputs are expected (from RecordInput schema), what is returned (Record object with ID), and side effects (record becomes active). This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getRecord' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks specificity about what is returned and what parameters are required. Enhanced version clarifies the retrieval action, specifies the Record object structure, and explicitly mentions required parameters for AI agent clarity.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a DNS record by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific DNS record from the specified zone by its ID. Returns the complete Record object including name, type, content, TTL, priority, and other metadata. Requires valid zone_id and record ID parameters.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what is returned and what parameters are required. Enhanced version clarifies the retrieval action, specifies the Record object structure, and explicitly mentions required parameters for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'updateRecord' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description provides no context about inputs, outputs, or update behavior. Improved version specifies: what is being updated (DNS record), what inputs are expected (RecordInput fields), what is returned (updated Record object), and important behavior detail (full replacement, not partial updates) for AI agent decision-making.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing DNS record in the specified zone. Accepts RecordInput with updated values for name, type, content, TTL, and priority. Returns the updated Record object with all current values. All provided fields will be replaced; partial updates are not supported.
data.reasoning: Original description provides no context about inputs, outputs, or update behavior. Improved version specifies: what is being updated (DNS record), what inputs are expected (RecordInput fields), what is returned (updated Record object), and important behavior detail (full replacement, not partial updates) for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'deleteRecord' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks critical details about permanence and effects. Enhanced version clarifies: the destructive nature of the operation, what parameters are required, the immediate effect (record no longer resolves), the response type, and importantly that deletion is irreversible - crucial for AI agents to avoid accidental deletions.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete a DNS record from a zone
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a DNS record from the specified zone. Requires valid zone_id and record ID. The record is immediately removed and no longer resolves. Returns a success response (typically 200 or 204). This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about permanence and effects. Enhanced version clarifies: the destructive nature of the operation, what parameters are required, the immediate effect (record no longer resolves), the response type, and importantly that deletion is irreversible - crucial for AI agents to avoid accidental deletions.

message: Operation 'createZone' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too minimal and repetitive of the summary. Enhanced description specifies what inputs are required (zone name, optional parameters), what is returned (zone object with ID), and side effects (zone becomes available for use). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full context and effects.

data.description_suggestion: Create a new DNS zone. Requires zone name and optional parameters in the request body. Returns the newly created zone object with assigned ID and default settings. The zone becomes immediately available for DNS record management.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal and repetitive of the summary. Enhanced description specifies what inputs are required (zone name, optional parameters), what is returned (zone object with ID), and side effects (zone becomes available for use). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full context and effects.

message: Operation 'updateZone' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too minimal and lacks essential details. Enhanced description specifies the input requirement (zone ID), explains what can be updated (zone configuration), clarifies partial update support, indicates the return value (updated zone object), and notes the immediate effect of changes. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's full scope and impact.

data.description_suggestion: Update an existing DNS zone by ID. Accepts zone configuration parameters in the request body. Returns the updated zone object. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Changes take effect immediately.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal and lacks essential details. Enhanced description specifies the input requirement (zone ID), explains what can be updated (zone configuration), clarifies partial update support, indicates the return value (updated zone object), and notes the immediate effect of changes. This enables AI agents to understand the operation's full scope and impact.

message: Operation 'deleteZone' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too minimal. Enhanced description specifies the input requirement (zone ID), clarifies the destructive nature and scope of the operation (zone and all records are removed), indicates the response (HTTP 204), and warns about irreversibility. This helps AI agents understand the operation's critical side effects and make informed decisions about when to use it.

data.description_suggestion: Delete a DNS zone by ID. Permanently removes the zone and all associated DNS records. Requires zone ID as path parameter. Returns HTTP 204 on successful deletion. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Enhanced description specifies the input requirement (zone ID), clarifies the destructive nature and scope of the operation (zone and all records are removed), indicates the response (HTTP 204), and warns about irreversibility. This helps AI agents understand the operation's critical side effects and make informed decisions about when to use it.

message: Operation 'listRecords' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Current description is too minimal and repetitive of the summary. Enhanced description specifies the required input (zone ID), mentions available capabilities (filtering, sorting, pagination), and clarifies the output structure (array of record objects with specific fields). This provides AI agents with better context for understanding the operation's capabilities and expected results.

data.description_suggestion: List all DNS records for a specific zone. Requires zone ID as path parameter. Supports optional filtering, sorting, and pagination. Returns an array of record objects containing type, name, value, TTL, and other DNS record details.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal and repetitive of the summary. Enhanced description specifies the required input (zone ID), mentions available capabilities (filtering, sorting, pagination), and clarifies the output structure (array of record objects with specific fields). This provides AI agents with better context for understanding the operation's capabilities and expected results.
